name: Gus Edwards
abstract: Gustave Edwards (August 18, 1878 – November 7, 1945) was an American composer, songwriter and film director. He also was a vaudevillian, organized his own theater companies and was a music publisher.

concerts.label: Benefit: Jewish Community Center of Saranac Lake

about_quotes.speaker: Dominic James "Nick" La Rocca
about_quotes.evidence: And Edwards, Regas, and myself. ... That was the original Vixenland Jazz Band. All the masterpieces had been made before Edwards was drafted into the Army.

about_quotes.speaker: Emile Christian and Anthony Sbarbaro
about_quotes.evidence: Well downstairs they had Gus Edwards's original review with about 35 people.
about_quotes.doc_title: Emile Christian and Anthony Sbarbaro Interview, 1959-02-11
